summary: Project equityResponse items to the flat shape novel analysis commands query before storing in writeThroughCache.
reason: NSE India equity quote responses wrap data under 'equityResponse' with nested fields; writeThroughCache only handled 'results'/'data'/'items'/'id' envelopes so equity data was never persisted, causing all eight novel commands to always return empty results.
validated_outcome: After running equity quote, SELECT from resources WHERE resource_type='equity' returns rows keyed symbol_YYYYMMDD with correct symbol, lastPrice, deliveryToTradedQty, varMargin, extremeLossMargin, and metadata.preOpenMarket.IEP fields. delivery-spike returns spike signals after 2+ sessions.
